title: Tensura: Creation
body:
This is an addon for the Tensura: Reincarnated mod. My friend and I wanted some skills that aren't in the mod, so I made them myself. This is my first time making a mod, so expect many bugs! Suggestions are welcome in the discord!



1.1 and up requires Ice and Fire beta 3!



Discord: https://discord.gg/xCQ6H79tjy



Heres the wiki: https://tensuracreationmod.fandom.com/wiki/Tensura:creation.mod_Wiki



Currently added unique skills are: Accelerator, Avenger, Baby Face, Cursed Speech, Daemon Trigger Storm, Dragon Summoner, Food Chain, Freeloader, Initiator, Motivation, Physically Unmatched, Remote Bomb, Skill Collector, Taker, Vessel Taker.



Models made by Ry and Hiroyuk1Kun and Textures are made by san3030cae.
